title: Egghead Escape — Chapter 1122
main_description: The Straw Hats, Bonney, the giants, and the Vegapunk broadcast push Egghead toward its escape point while the world learns that the One Piece will decide the fate of the era. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 118 cleaned dialogue lines.
